title: MDBF IMPORTANT MIDTERM ANNOUNCEMENT
content:
MDBF IMPORTANT MIDTERM ANNOUNCEMENT

MDBF IMPORTANT MIDTERM ANNOUNCEMENT

According to the decision taken by the University Senate, all exams will be conducted face-to-face in the Spring Semester of the 2025–2026 Academic Year as well. Students who are unable to complete their course registrations before the midterm exams and therefore cannot attend the exams, as well as students who have been unable to return to Türkiye due to war-related reasons, may submit a request for leave of absence via the Registration Freeze System (

http://freeze.uskudaruniversitesi.edu.tr/login

) no later than Sunday, April 19, 2026.

Students who are unable to attend midterm exams due to valid excuses may apply for a make-up exam by submitting a petition through the Petition Tracking System available on our Faculty’s website (

https://online.uskudar.edu.tr/

), along with supporting documents such as medical reports. The deadline for submitting such petitions is Sunday, April 19, 2026. The make-up exams for students whose excuses are approved will be held between April 27–30, 2026, on a date and time to be determined by the course instructor.
